title: NZ Government Web Accessibility Standard 1.2
description: Mandatory standard requiring all NZ public sector departments and Executive branch agencies to meet WCAG 2.2 Level AA accessibility requirements for publicly and internally facing web pages, effective 17 March 2025. Includes specific exceptions for complex visual maps, prerecorded media, and inactive pages, with assessment and reporting obligations to the Government Chief Digital Officer.

source.page_title: Web Accessibility Standard 1.2 | NZ Digital government
